title: hieracium murorum subsp. hololoma
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. hololoma, also known as Wall Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. hololoma include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil, and can be used to create teas, tinctures, or salves.
